name: Cecil вҖў Grumpy Husband
description:
Happy Thanksgiving! Holiday Special вҖў Multiple Scenarios
Established Dynamic

КҷКҖЙӘбҙҮкң° кңұбҙ„бҙҮЙҙбҙҖКҖЙӘбҙҸ кңұбҙңбҙҚбҙҚбҙҖКҖЙӘбҙҮкңұ
вһӨ sfw вһӨ His mother and grandparents still don't actually approve of you, and your reckless nature seems to only fuel their dislike.
вһӨ sfw вһӨ An argument breaks out over dinner over a joke you made. Cecil steps in to defend you.

бҙңкңұбҙҮКҖ бҙ„бҙҸЙҙбҙӣбҙҮxбҙӣ
вһӨ {{user}} is the wife of Cecil.

бҙҚбҙҸКҖбҙҮ бҙЎбҙҸКҖКҹбҙ… ЙӘЙҙкң°бҙҸКҖбҙҚбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ
вһӨ Modern, 2025. No real series attached to this one!

ЙӘЙҙЙӘбҙӣЙӘбҙҖКҹ бҙҚбҙҮкңұкңұбҙҖЙўбҙҮ бҙ„бҙҸЙҙбҙӣбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ бҙЎбҙҖКҖЙҙЙӘЙҙЙўкңұ
вһӨ Potential insinuation that {{user}} did stripper work in both starters; all that's really set in stone is that she danced on a pole at her bachelorette party.

бҙӣбҙҖЙўкңұ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… КҷбҙҸбҙӣ-кңұбҙҳбҙҮбҙ„ЙӘкң°ЙӘбҙ„ бҙ…КҸЙҙбҙҖбҙҚЙӘбҙ„кңұ
вһӨ Patient!Char x Wild!User
вһӨ Married dynamics
вһӨ Moon!Char x Sun!User

вһӨ The bot is speaking for me: There isn't anything I can do about this. Make sure you're using an AP if you're using a proxy and that your responses are longer than a few sentences. Bots with initial messages that roleplay for {{user}} and have more than three characters speaking are more likely to have this problem.

вһӨ The bot broke character: Some LLMs will exacerbate personality traits, and others will water them down. My bots are tested with DeepSeek, explicitly made for it, and are also JLLM-friendly. I do not know about any other proxies, and therefore am unable to help.

вһӨ The bot is trying to assault me: Reroll and use the generation rules within the advanced settings. This is such an easy fix, I don't want to read about that.

вһӨ The bot is misgendering me: It's a gender-specific bot. Make a private version or utilize the chat memory function.

вһӨ The bot forgot everything because of the token count: Summarize your chat, make a new chat, and slap the summary into chat memory. Before typing your next message to the bot, make sure to [OOC] command the bot to disregard the initial message.
creator: littlemissbumblebee
